creator: stephen@cauchy.math.missouri.edu
text:
patches do not apply properly when making dvipdfm port.

Fix: 

Delete /usr/ports/print/files and contents thereof.

(I did say this in the original update in
http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=28493 .)
How-To-Repeat: 
cvsup to very latest ports
cd /usr/ports/print/dvipdfm
make
